summary: Iteration 346 - Geo Detection and Admin Country Reports. Backend: 17/17 tests passed. All geo detection API endpoints working (TZ/KE/UG timezone detection). Admin reports API returns country breakdown for all 3 countries. Frontend: Marketplace shows country selector (TZ dropdown), Admin Reports page loads with all elements (period selector, country breakdown table, export button). Login rate-limited during UI testing (429) which is expected security behavior.
critical_code_review_comments: Geo detection API correctly uses timezone hints to detect country (Africa/Dar_es_Salaam→TZ, Africa/Nairobi→KE, Africa/Kampala→UG)
Admin reports API returns all 3 countries (TZ/KE/UG) with revenue, profit, orders, new_customers metrics
Country Reports link properly configured in admin sidebar under Reports section (admin role only)
Marketplace auto-detects country on load using browser timezone via /api/geo/detect-country
AdminReportsPage.jsx has proper data-testid attributes for testing

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All features verified (login rate-limited during testing is expected)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Geo detection and admin reports fully implemented. 1) GET /api/geo/detect-country?tz=Africa/Dar_es_Salaam returns TZ, ?tz=Africa/Nairobi returns KE, ?tz=Africa/Kampala returns UG. 2) GET /api/admin/reports/summary?period=month returns country breakdown for TZ/KE/UG with revenue, profit, orders, new_customers. 3) GET /api/admin/reports/vendors returns vendor list with country_code. 4) GET /api/admin/reports/customers returns customer metrics. 5) Admin Reports page at /admin/country-reports shows period selector and country breakdown table. 6) Country Reports link in admin sidebar under Reports section. 7) Marketplace auto-detects country on load. Note: Login has rate limiting (429 after multiple attempts) - wait 60+ seconds between login attempts.

reports_vendors.details: GET /api/admin/reports/vendors returns vendor list with country_code

admin_reports_page.details: Admin Reports page at /admin/country-reports loads with period selector, country breakdown table, export button

marketplace_country_selector.details: Marketplace shows TZ country selector dropdown, 37 products displayed

sidebar_reports_link.details: Country Reports link configured in admin sidebar under Reports section
